results.title: The effect of famotidine on gastroesophageal and duodeno-gastro-esophageal refluxes in critically ill patients.
results.abstract: To investigate the effect of famotidine on gastroesophageal reflux (GER) and duodeno-gastro-esophageal reflux (DGER) and to explore it's possible mechanisms. To identify the relevant factors of the reflux.

results.title: [H2-blockers of histamine receptors in the therapy of early stages of gastroduodenal reflux disease].
results.abstract: The efficacy of the administration of famotidine, 20 mg BID, at early stages of gastroduodenal reflux disease (GDRD) based on a clinical and endoscopy study and treatment of patients of 0 and 1 degrees on the modified Savary-Miller scale.
results.journal: Eksperimental'naia i klinicheskaia gastroenterologiia = Experimental & clinical gastroenterology
